summary: The diff implements REQ-1 (frontend loading fixes, error boundaries, actor initialization guards) and REQ-3 (loading indicators, error messages, no blank screen) comprehensively. REQ-2 (backend migration.mo for subgroup field transformation) is referenced in the build request but no evidence of a migration.mo file being added or modified appears in the diff — the backend/main.mo is modified but no migration logic for transforming old `subgroup` to `scienceSubgroup`/`commerceSubgroup` is visible in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the backend migration module (migration.mo) is correctly applied on canister upgrade so that existing state (including the old single `subgroup` field) is properly transformed to the new `scienceSubgroup` and `commerceSubgroup` fields without causing a trap or error during post-upgrade.
missing_requirements.reason: No migration.mo file was added or modified in the diff. The backend/main.mo is modified but the truncated content shows no post-upgrade migration logic that transforms old `subgroup` field entries to `scienceSubgroup`/`commerceSubgroup`. The diff summary lists no file named migration.mo among added or modified files.
